role: Test suite verifying architectural boundaries and contracts across ArchSpine components.
responsibility: This directory contains automated tests that enforce behavioral and structural boundaries: the help system must direct users correctly (help-boundary-contract), view module components must reside in the expected package (view-module-boundary), and file write operations must respect protection rules (writer-boundary). Together they ensure modular isolation, correct CLI messaging, and safe I/O.

children.role: Automated test suite that verifies the help text contract for CLI commands, ensuring that `spine sync` help directs users to `spine build` for baseline rebuilds and that general help contains expected usage line.
Vitest test file validating the module boundary of view-related components under src/services/view.
Test suite for the SpineWriterBoundary class and withProtectedOutputsWriteAccess function, using vitest to validate write protection behavior against the local filesystem.
